title: Excessive Force — Copy of Police Report Required
text: In any case, otherwise authorized by law, in which the party seeking disclosure is alleging excessive force by a peace officer or custodial officer in connection with the arrest of that party, or for conduct alleged to have occurred within a jail facility, the motion shall include a copy of the police report setting forth the circumstances under which the party was stopped and arrested.

structure.article_title: Official Information and Identity of Informer

source.editorial_note: Amended by Stats. 2002, Ch. 391, Sec. 3. Effective January 1, 2003.
